nodes.label: Unauthenticated request (no cookie) must be rejected with 401 UNAUTHORIZED.
nodes.norm_label: unauthenticated request (no cookie) must be rejected with 401 unauthorized.

nodes.label: The guard must fire before query-param validation — never a 422 on missing auth.
nodes.norm_label: the guard must fire before query-param validation — never a 422 on missing auth.

nodes.label: A syntactically invalid session cookie must be rejected with 401.
nodes.norm_label: a syntactically invalid session cookie must be rejected with 401.

nodes.label: An empty string cookie value must be rejected with 401.
nodes.norm_label: an empty string cookie value must be rejected with 401.

nodes.label: A base64-looking but unsigned blob must fail token decoding → 401.
nodes.norm_label: a base64-looking but unsigned blob must fail token decoding → 401.

nodes.label: The 401 response must carry the standard error envelope (success/error/code/mess
nodes.norm_label: the 401 response must carry the standard error envelope (success/error/code/mess

nodes.label: Every admin endpoint must reject unauthenticated requests with 401.

nodes.label: Admin user query helpers — filter escaping, status/role filters, sort tokens.  P
nodes.norm_label: admin user query helpers — filter escaping, status/role filters, sort tokens.  p

nodes.label: Defaults (no q, status='all', role='all') produce an empty filter.
nodes.norm_label: defaults (no q, status='all', role='all') produce an empty filter.

nodes.label: Explicit None q with all-sentinel filters still produces an empty filter.
nodes.norm_label: explicit none q with all-sentinel filters still produces an empty filter.

nodes.label: re.escape must be applied to q before it becomes a $regex value.
nodes.norm_label: re.escape must be applied to q before it becomes a $regex value.

nodes.label: Free-text q must produce an $or branch for both 'name' and 'emailid'.
nodes.norm_label: free-text q must produce an $or branch for both 'name' and 'emailid'.

nodes.label: The regex must carry the 'i' option for case-insensitive matching.
nodes.norm_label: the regex must carry the 'i' option for case-insensitive matching.

nodes.label: A bare dot is a regex wildcard; re.escape must neutralise it.
nodes.norm_label: a bare dot is a regex wildcard; re.escape must neutralise it.

nodes.label: Strings longer than 100 chars must be rejected by the schema (DoS guard).
nodes.norm_label: strings longer than 100 chars must be rejected by the schema (dos guard).

nodes.label: The 'all' sentinel must NOT add a 'status' key to the filter document.
nodes.norm_label: the 'all' sentinel must not add a 'status' key to the filter document.

nodes.label: Values outside the Literal whitelist must be rejected by Pydantic.
nodes.norm_label: values outside the literal whitelist must be rejected by pydantic.

nodes.label: role='admin' must add isAdmin=True to the filter (not the string 'admin').
nodes.norm_label: role='admin' must add isadmin=true to the filter (not the string 'admin').

nodes.label: role='user' must add isAdmin=False (not the string 'user').
nodes.norm_label: role='user' must add isadmin=false (not the string 'user').

nodes.label: The 'all' sentinel must NOT add an 'isAdmin' key to the filter document.
nodes.norm_label: the 'all' sentinel must not add an 'isadmin' key to the filter document.

nodes.label: Both status and role can be applied simultaneously.
nodes.norm_label: both status and role can be applied simultaneously.

nodes.label: q, status, and role can all be applied in a single filter.
nodes.norm_label: q, status, and role can all be applied in a single filter.

nodes.label: Every field in AdminUserSortBy must produce a valid '+field' token.
nodes.norm_label: every field in adminusersortby must produce a valid '+field' token.

nodes.label: Every field in AdminUserSortBy must produce a valid '-field' token.
nodes.norm_label: every field in adminusersortby must produce a valid '-field' token.

nodes.norm_label: default sortby must be 'createdat' per the schema contract (§3.7).

nodes.label: Default sortOrder must be 'desc' (newest first) per the schema contract.
nodes.norm_label: default sortorder must be 'desc' (newest first) per the schema contract.

nodes.label: A sort key not in the Literal whitelist must be rejected by Pydantic.
nodes.norm_label: a sort key not in the literal whitelist must be rejected by pydantic.
